description: Extended media type mapping covers sticker (20), document (8), contact card (64), location (5), live location (42)
steps: Test msg_type=5 produces MessageContent::Media with mime 'application/vnd.geo+json' or similar
Test msg_type=64 produces MessageContent::Media with mime 'text/vcard'

description: Payment message type (64) is extracted with transaction metadata
steps: Test msg_type=66 (WhatsApp Pay) produces recognizable MessageContent::Unknown(66) or dedicated variant
Assert no panic on unknown high-value msg_types (9, 16, 23, 65, 67, 70, 74)
